core_mechanism: computing a multivariate weighted generating function (graded partition function) of a discrete combinatorial ensemble by expressing it as a vacuum-to-vacuum expectation value of a product of non-commuting vertex/transfer operators, which factorizes the count into a sequence of single-slice operator applications and yields a closed product formula
brief_reason: The abstract derives multivariate generating functions that q-enumerate box-coloured plane partitions using the Okounkov-Reshetikhin-Vafa vertex-operator method, i.e. a transfer-operator slicing of the ensemble that produces a graded weighted count.
